hero.subtitle: Ladies Hair Salon & Beauty
hero.title: Art of Beauty, Reimagined
hero.description: Discover an exceptional beauty experience in our salon. Hair styling, facials, manicures and more. Every visit is a moment of luxury.

beforeAfter.subtitle: Our lash lifts provide a stunning yet natural enhancement. Witness the difference!

servicesOverview.subtitle: Our Expertise
servicesOverview.title: Exceptional Services
servicesOverview.description: From hair styling to complete treatments, we offer a full range of beauty services performed by passionate experts.

why_us.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why_us.title: The Essence of Maison de Beauté
why_us.description: We believe everyone deserves a unique, personalised and caring beauty experience. Here's what sets us apart.

reasons.title: Expertise
reasons.desc: Our experts are trained in the latest techniques and continuously perfect their craft.

reasons.title: Personalised Care
reasons.desc: Every consultation is tailored to your features, desires and unique lifestyle.

reasons.title: Premium Products
reasons.desc: We rigorously select high-end, safe and effective products for your skin.

reasons.title: Natural Approach
reasons.desc: We favour treatments that respect your skin and the environment without compromising results.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We start with an in-depth consultation to understand your expectations, style and the condition of your skin or hair.

steps.title: Advice
steps.desc: Our experts analyse your needs and propose a bespoke programme with the most suitable techniques and products.

steps.title: Treatment & Care
steps.desc: We carry out your treatment with precision and passion, using technical gestures and carefully selected products.

steps.title: Follow up
steps.desc: We support you long term with maintenance advice and personalised recommendations to enhance your everyday beauty.

ctaHome.title: Ready to Shine?
ctaHome.description: Book your appointment today and let us reveal your natural beauty.

aboutPage.subtitle: Our Story
aboutPage.title: A Passion for Beauty
aboutPage.p1: Founded with the vision of creating a space where luxury and well-being meet, our salon has become a benchmark in beauty and personalized care.
aboutPage.p2: Our team of passionate experts uses the most advanced techniques and the most prestigious products to offer you an incomparable experience.
aboutPage.p3: Each visit is an invitation to a sensory journey, in an elegant and refined setting, designed for your absolute comfort.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We strive for perfection in every gesture and every treatment.

values.title: Personalization
values.desc: Every client is unique, every treatment is tailor-made.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We embrace the latest beauty trends and technologies.

values.title: Well-being
values.desc: Your comfort and serenity are our absolute priority.

services_page.subtitle: Our Services
services_page.title: Prices & Services
services_page.description: Discover our complete menu of beauty services, each designed to enhance your natural beauty.

bookingPage.subtitle: I'm excited to welcome you! Please fill out the form below to request your preferred date and time. I'll get back to you shortly to confirm.

toast.successDescription: Jenni will be in touch soon to confirm.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: We would love to hear from you. Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.

footer.description: Your exceptional beauty destination for hair, care, wellness and more. We enhance your natural beauty.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number and service preferences when booking or contacting us.

sections.title: 2. Use of Data
sections.content: Your personal data is used to manage appointments, contact you about our services, improve our website, send marketing communications (with consent), and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 3. Legal Basis
sections.content: We process your data based on your consent, contract performance, our legitimate interests, and compliance with legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: We never sell your personal data. We may share it with service providers who help us operate our business, always in GDPR compliance.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer period is required by law.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: Under GDPR you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, data portability, and object. Contact us at contact@beaute-divine.be.

sections.title: 7. Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy contact us at: contact@beaute-divine.be or 123 Avenue de la Beauté, 1000 Brussels, Belgium.

sections.title: 1. What is a Cookie?
sections.content: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit a website. Cookies help us run the site, keep it secure, and improve your experience.

sections.title: 2. Types of Cookies
sections.content: Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Analytical cookies help us understand how visitors use our website. Preference cookies remember settings such as language. Marketing cookies may be used to display relevant advertisements.

sections.title: 3. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Please note that blocking some cookies may affect your experience on our website.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: Some cookies may be placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We do not control these cookies and recommend consulting their respective privacy policies.

sections.title: 5. Changes
sections.content: We may update this cookie policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through our website.

cookieBanner.title: We respect your privacy
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. You can customise your preferences below.
cookieBanner.essentialDesc: Required for the site to work. Cannot be disabled.
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site.
cookieBanner.marketingDesc: Used to offer you personalised content.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.content: These terms govern the use of our website and beauty services. By using our services, you accept these terms.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: We offer hair, facial, nail, waxing, makeup and other beauty services. Descriptions and prices are indicative and may change without notice.

sections.title: 3. Appointments
sections.content: Appointments can be made by phone, email or via our online form. Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee.

sections.title: 4. Prices & Payment
sections.content: Prices are in euros and include VAT. Payment is due at the end of each service. We accept cash, bank cards and transfers.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.content: We do our best to provide quality services. Please inform us of any known allergies before the treatment begins.

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this site (texts, images, logos) is protected by copyright and may not be reproduced without our written permission.

sections.title: 7. Applicable Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by Belgian law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of Brussels.
